metadata.description: PyPI 上传: ```python # Command for uploading to PyPI twine upload dist/* # Test the upload on TestPyPI first twine upload --repository-url https://test.pypi.org/legacy/ dist/* # API token authentication is required for both commands above ``` Explanation: - `twine upload dist/*`: This command uploads the distribution files (usually created by tools like `python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel`) to the Python Package Index (PyPI). - `twine upload --repository-url https://test.pypi.org/legacy/ dist/*`: This is used to test the upload process on TestPyPI, which is a testing environment for PyPI. - API token authentication: Both commands require an API token for authentication. You can obtain this by registering on PyPI and generating a personal access token from your account settings. Note that `twine` is a command-line utility used to upload Python packages to PyPI or other package indexes, and it handles the necessary authentication and metadata validation.

You can obtain this by registering on PyPI and generating a personal access token from your account settings. Note that `twine` is a command-line utility used to upload Python packages to PyPI or other package indexes, and it handles the necessary authentication and metadata validation.
